response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical versatility and entrepreneurial experience, particularly with open-source projects like GISCollective and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his background lacks explicit Director-level leadership, deep AI/ML expertise, or a track record of driving AI strategy at scale, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure engineering with 15+ years of experience.
Entrepreneurial mindset evidenced by founding GISCollective and open-source contributions.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators).
concerns: No explicit Director-level individual contributor experience or leadership in AI strategy.
Lacks advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields or demonstrated deep AI/ML expertise.
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption.
